creator: andreas.herz@makandra.de
text:
That fixes our issue, thanks a lot! The "upstream_check_module" is back in. Will this be included in upstream?

We also saw that in the configure arguments those parts were added:

"--without-mail_imap_module --without-mail_pop3_module --without-mail_smtp_module"

But AFAIK those have been disabled before as well but not shown in the configure options.
